summary: Phase 1 Part B testing completed. All real order data integration features working correctly. Login with owner@mygeniedev.com loads 30 running orders. Dashboard shows real Dine In Orders (6 cards with WC labels, customer names, amounts, status badges), Delivery Orders (0 - 'No active orders'), and TakeAway Orders (24 orders with real data).

issues: Walk-In section header not shown because restaurant uses flat table layout (no sectionName). Walk-in orders display as virtual cards mixed with physical tables - this is by design for flat layouts.
'Waiter:' field shows empty value - confirmed: waiter info not available from running orders API

critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.jsx line 268: useMemo has missing dependencies warning (deliveryOrders, orderItemsByTableId, takeAwayOrders) - minor ESLint warning, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: None - using real API data from Mygenie Dev restaurant
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Part B complete. All order data now comes from real API. Login: owner@mygeniedev.com / Qplazm@10. Restaurant has 30 running orders: 24 takeaway + 6 dine-in (all walk-in). 5 physical tables (TT1-TT5, all available). mockRooms still used for room section (Phase 2).

login_and_loading.details: Login with owner@mygeniedev.com / Qplazm@10 works. Loading screen shows 7 steps including 'Running Orders'. Redirects to dashboard after all data loads.

dashboard_default_view.details: Shows Dine In Orders (6 cards), Delivery Orders (0 Orders - 'No active orders'), TakeAway Orders (24 Orders). All three channels visible by default.

dine_in_order_cards.details: Cards show: WC labels for walk-in customers, customer names (harsh, saurav, Noname), amounts (₹94.5, ₹1,050, ₹168, ₹143, ₹35, ₹1), time elapsed (7 days, 8 days, 9 days, 16 days), status badges (OCCUPIED, BILL READY)

status_badges.details: f_order_status=2 (ready) → OCCUPIED badge, f_order_status=5 (served) → BILL READY badge, f_order_status=8 (running) → OCCUPIED badge. All mappings correct.

delivery_section.details: Shows 'Delivery Orders | 0 Orders' and 'No active orders' message. Correct - restaurant has no delivery orders.

takeaway_section.details: Shows 'TakeAway Orders | 24 Orders'. Cards display: order numbers (#000217, #000218, etc.), WC labels, customer names (Saurav, harsh, Reds, p), items (Test (1), Vada Pav (1)), amounts (₹35, ₹1), RUNNING/READY status badges, 'Assign Rider' button for ready orders.

dine_tab_table_grid.details: Shows 'All Tables | 11 Tables'. Walk-in orders displayed as virtual cards (harsh ₹168, harsh ₹143, WC ₹94.5, harsh ₹1,050, saurav ₹35, Noname ₹1). Physical tables (TT1-TT5) shown as available with gray border.

order_entry.details: Click table opens 3-panel layout. Left: real categories (All, Popular, Bakery, Breakfast, etc.). Middle: real products with Customize buttons. Right: cart panel.

variation_modal.details: Click Customize opens modal with: product name (Dosa), Veg badge, FANCY ITEM options (Ginger, Cheese +₹100, Paneer +₹50, etc.), COLD DRINK options (7 up +₹20, etc.), ADDONS (coconut +₹60, garlic +₹20), quantity selector, total price, 'Add to Order' button.

settings_panel.details: Click Settings in sidebar opens panel with: Restaurant Info, Operating Hours, Tax & GST, Payment Methods, Discount Types, Printers, Cancellation Reasons, Table Management, Delivery Settings, General Settings, Service Charge.

menu_management_panel.details: Click Menu Management opens panel with: All Items (210 products), categories with counts, products list with name, category, stock status, veg/non-veg, channel availability, station (KDS), price.

mocked_data_note: MOCKED: mockRooms still used for room section (Phase 2). All order data is now REAL from API.
